name: yzmir-training-optimization
description: Training stability - modern optimizers (AdamW/Lion/Sophia/Muon/AdEMAMix/Schedule-Free/Prodigy/8-bit Adam), schedules (cosine/WSD), precision (BF16/FP8 E4M3/E5M2), batch sizing (B_crit, Chinchilla), gradients, convergence, hyperparameters (incl. muP), debugging. 11 skills + 3 commands + 2 agents.
